meta.title: Email System Consolidation: 6 Files to 1 Pattern
meta.excerpt: Building a maintainable email template architecture

props.text: Transactional emails were split across six providers and multiple API keys. Each product team chose its own provider, which created inconsistent templates, different deliverability settings, and a fragmented audit trail.

props.title: The Operational Cost
props.body: Multiple providers increased vendor management effort and made incident response slow. We needed a single source of truth.

props.text: We had inconsistent SPF/DKIM alignment, varying retry policies, and a mix of templates with no shared governance. Failures were hard to debug because logs were spread across multiple dashboards.
We consolidated to one provider with a shared template system, centralized sender domains, and standardized retry policies. A single service wrapper now handles every email.

steps.title: Inventory
steps.description: Catalog every template, sender, and provider integration.

steps.title: Unify Domains
steps.description: Move to a single sender domain with aligned SPF/DKIM/DMARC.

steps.title: Build Wrapper
steps.description: Create a shared email service with templates and retries.

steps.title: Migrate Workflows
steps.description: Move transactional and marketing flows to the new provider.

steps.title: Monitor
steps.description: Track deliverability and bounce rates on a shared dashboard.

props.beforeCode:
// Different providers
await sendgrid.send(payload)
await mailgun.send(payload)
await ses.send(payload)

features.title: Standardize First
features.description: Define templates and policy rules before migrating providers.

features.title: Create a Wrapper
features.description: Centralize send logic so provider changes are invisible to teams.

features.title: Measure Deliverability
features.description: Treat delivery rate as a first-class metric with dashboards.

features.title: Plan Rollback
features.description: Staged migration reduced risk and allowed quick recovery.

props.title: Key Takeaway
props.body: Consolidate email infrastructure behind a shared service. It improves deliverability, reduces cost, and makes auditing significantly easier.
